role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified Devanagari script and associated languages (Hindi/Nepali).
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, soil color, and vegetation types consistent with the Indo-Gangetic plain.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Discussed tropical deciduous trees and monsoon-driven growth patterns.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Noted the lack of formal signage/bollards and road shoulder conditions.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized construction styles (unplastered brick) and Google Street View image artifacts.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified India. The specialists provided grounded, image-consistent evidence. The tournament logic correctly used the script evidence to eliminate non-Devanagari candidates and then used landscape/architecture cues to distinguish India from Nepal.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Vegetation and soil descriptions match the visual evidence.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Plant types described are consistent with the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Observations about road markings and lack of bollards are accurate.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Construction details (red brick) match the image.
